name: default
description: Markdown sibling of the flowchart template: a mermaid flowchart block plus an ASCII fallback and prose node/edge lists. The agent renders nodes[]/edges[] into mermaid node+edge lines before substitution.

slots.description: One or two sentence description of the flow.
Pre-rendered mermaid node declarations, one per line (e.g. 'push([git push main])').
Pre-rendered mermaid edge lines, one per line (e.g. 'push --> ci').
ASCII-art fallback rendering of the same flow for plain-text contexts.
Prose bullet list of nodes with id, label, and kind.
Prose bullet list of directed edges with optional labels.

shape.nodes[]: { id: string, label: string, kind: enum[process,terminal,decision,ok,bad] }
shape.edges[]: { from: string, to: string, label: string (optional) }
